tiles.title: Logs by Category
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(p_log_category, severity_text, 'unknown') AS category, COUNT(*) AS records FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY category ORDER BY records DESC LIMIT 10

tiles.title: Redis Commands in Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT regexp_replace(body, '^.*\"([^\"]+)\".*$', '\\1') AS command, COUNT(*) AS records FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY command ORDER BY records DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Auth and Error-like Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE (body ILIKE '%ERR%' OR body ILIKE '%error%' OR body ILIKE '%AUTH%') GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Recent Redis Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, COALESCE(p_log_category, severity_text, 'unknown') AS category, body FROM $logs_dataset ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

tiles.title: Error Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $traces_dataset WHERE (span_status_code != 0 OR span_status_description != 'UNSET')

tiles.title: Spans by Operation
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("db.operation.name", span_name, 'unknown') AS operation, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY operation ORDER BY spans DESC LIMIT 12

tiles.title: Span Status
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(span_status_description, 'unknown') AS status, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY status ORDER BY spans DESC

tiles.title: Latency by Operation
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("db.operation.name", span_name, 'unknown') AS operation, approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95)/1000000 AS p95_ms, avg(span_duration_ns)/1000000 AS avg_ms FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY operation ORDER BY p95_ms DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Recent Error Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, span_trace_id, span_name, COALESCE("db.operation.name", 'unknown') AS operation, span_status_description, span_status_message, span_duration_ns/1000000 AS duration_ms FROM $traces_dataset WHERE (span_status_code != 0 OR span_status_description != 'UNSET') ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

tiles.title: Metric Families by Prefix
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT CASE WHEN metric_name LIKE 'redis.%' THEN 'otel-dotted' WHEN metric_name LIKE 'redis_%' THEN 'redis-exporter' WHEN metric_name LIKE 'process_%' THEN 'process' ELSE 'other' END AS prefix, COUNT(DISTINCT metric_name) AS families FROM $metrics_dataset GROUP BY prefix ORDER BY families DESC

tiles.title: Redis Instances Inventory
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE("service.instance.id", 'unknown') AS instance, COALESCE(redis_role, 'unknown') AS role, COALESCE(release, 'unknown') AS release, COALESCE("server.address", 'unknown') AS server_address FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='redis_up' ORDER BY role, instance
